continuity_reason: The 16 labeled gazes advance clockwise in 22.5 degree steps with no reversal or swapped frame. Character identity, silhouette scale, center, and foot baseline remain stable. Foreground area spans 21607 to 22450 pixels; every adjacent center delta is at most 1.5 pixels and every adjacent area ratio is at most 1.0172. The 157.5->180 diff of 1303 pixels is about 2.13 times its 612.5-pixel neighbor mean, but it is acceptable because the pupils correctly remove the last rightward component to reach the down endpoint while center delta is only 1.5 pixels and area ratio is 1.0139. The repeated alpha-hole rows describe the intentional gap between the legs and do not indicate identity damage.
